name: pi-agent
description: Chat with Pi using context from your notes, links, backlinks, tags, and search results.

scripts.format: prettier --write --no-error-on-unmatched-pattern AGENTS.md main.js styles.css src/**/*.js src/**/*.mjs tests/**/*.mjs scripts/*.mjs docs/*.md *.md *.json .github/workflows/*.yml
scripts.format:check: prettier --check --no-error-on-unmatched-pattern AGENTS.md main.js styles.css src/**/*.js src/**/*.mjs tests/**/*.mjs scripts/*.mjs docs/*.md *.md *.json .github/workflows/*.yml
scripts.ci: npm run build && npm run build:check && npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run version:check

author: Christian Lempa
